reviews.review_description: The game is almost perfect. It’s a perfect blend between silly and serious with fluid while working control controls and a good hub system however one of the major drawbacks is block count being set at a max of 1000 isn’t very much to use, especially when we want to build bigger ships. Another thing is the lack of connection points only the weapons and radar and cockpits have connection points meaning you cannot switch controls for engines or shield systems however, I love the current state of the game. Everything works well with the occasional glitch or two. ￼ but that’s normal and can make the game fun. ￼

developer_response.body: Wow that's so great to hear! We are continuously improving the game and your feedback is really valuable. If you haven't already, feel free to join our growing discord community.

reviews.review_description: At first, I had issues joining the game, but a super helpful developer helped me fix the error in the game is super fun to play 🙂.￼

developer_response.body: Glad we could help! Thank you for your review :)

reviews.review_title: A fun game with a mix of game types
reviews.review_description:
This game is part builder, part tower defense, part arcade flight Sim. It's a fun mix of types. Build your own custom space craft. Plan turrets in strategic locations, and fly your craft shooting down enemies.

It also has some very impressive graphics for this type of game on Standalone. It really gives you the feel that your in another dimension.

What's also great about this is that the developers are taking an already great game, and looking for ways to make it better. I'm on their Discord, and I got to say that Its always best when developers are actively supporting their game and looking for input from the community.

Definitely recommended.

developer_response.body: Thank you for being a part of this journey! We're just getting started :)

reviews.review_description: This game is a blast other then the tutorial being a little sucky but when you understand it’s as easy as 1 2 3 super quick and fun to test your ships, on my first ship I was thinking “I don’t think I’ll have enough energy” then I stopped caring and my builds got better and better, wish there was more people online though. One problem when entering a ship you get the weird view and for someone who plays hours of vr all day that’s the only thing that makes me slightly dizzy

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review and honest feedback. As you know we're still in early access and are constantly making improvements to the game. Hopefully we'll be able to address your concerns soon.

reviews.review_description: This game is crap and i want my money back now every time i build a ship it says insicnifacent energy and now i cant get my money back so thanks alot this game is a scam dont listen to others trust me

developer_response.body:
We accept criticism and we always work with users that have issues but we do not accept being called scammers. We work tirelessly to provide the best possible experience and have been updating the game continuously with content and features for the past year and will continue to do so.

We are sorry that you're having a bad experience and we'd like to help. Please reach out to our discord community and provide more details about the issue that you're facing.

reviews.review_title: I want to play but it won’t let me
reviews.review_description:
Pls friend me if you know to fix it 
       Im stuck in the tutorial  it won’t move on from the first step￼

developer_response.body: Oh no! That's awful, we'll try to work with you to address this situation. But in the meantime you can also join our discord community and there you should be able to find help very quickly.

reviews.review_description: It’s a very W game and it’s addictive worth my money you should really buy it(:

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're glad to hear that you're having a good time.

reviews.review_description:
Buildport Xumia:
If you told me a that there was a game like trailmakers in vr, I would believe you. You’d most likely show me the game, and I’d think that the game was mid. But, if you showed me Buildport Xumia, that’d be one of the only games that I would play on my headset. 

Creativity:
Buildport Xumia has a very unique and simplistic building system. You just grab two blocks of your choice and then attach them to eachother. That simplicity allows for you to learn how to build ships that are specialized for you without having to pour in hours to the game just to learn how to build.

Replayability:
You can play this game over and over again without getting bored due to repetitive gameplay. Most games are plagued with the same gameplay over and over again, but Buildport Xumia is immune to that plague. Buildport Xumia’s building system and current gamemodes keep the game from becoming “stale” and boring.

Combat:
As of right now, the combat would get an 8.5 in my books, it’s not perfect, but it isn’t bad either. The way that you can bind you controller buttons to certain parts is a very cool feature, it’s just that in my opinion, some buttons are underutilized. Correct me if I’m wrong, but I’m pretty sure that you’re not able to rebind your controller buttons in the settings. A setting like that would allow for smoother combat, and possibly more buttons like the thumbstick press to be used while fighting.

Maps:
As of right now there are only 4 maps, but those 4 maps do their job quite well. The arena map has many things to fly around and weave through so that builds based on speed and maneuvering can be utilized well. The one thing I do wish was added would be a flat, open map for just all out fights.

Overall rating:
8.7/10 
I would definitely recommend this to all new and old vr players

developer_response.body: Thank you for your detailed review! We hope you will continue to enjoy your experience as we work to bring further improvements and expand the gameplay in the future.

reviews.review_description:
Absolutely had a blast putting together my first ship, so much creativity to be explored and what a beautiful world to do it in. Flying was intuitive, my aim was less then accurate though haha more my own fault I’m sure.

Definitely a must play for any world explorer!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your review! We are glad to hear you're having a good time. A new update is coming soon with lots of new features and improvements which should improve the experience even more!

reviews.review_description:
This game is extremely fun and boosts creativity, i would give it five stars but sometimes the pieces don't connection properly and everything breaks.


I would definitely recommend or at least try it for free.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We are aware of some strange issues with construction and are working on fixes. A small update will be coming is going to be release in a week or so and a larger one is targeted for early Spring.

reviews.review_description: This is a great game but my multiplayer is not working at all i tried everything but otherwise its a amazing game i love it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! We're working on big updates that are coming very soon!

reviews.review_description:
This game is PEAK as someone who likes building things I really appreciate the customization when creating your ships. However there’s TWO things.

1) I wish they added another mode to where everyone is given a certain time *say 5 minutes* and at the end of the 5 minutes everyone fights till the last one standing. This would also have a higher energy amount say 2k-2.5k.

2) The game is new so they can’t really help it but the game does need more players…it’s very hard and long process trying to connect and fight REAL PEOPLE.

Other than those 2 things and raising the energy limit I have no concerns or problems with this game! 8.5/10 Definitely Recommend 👍
I really like the game but I feel there’s never anyone doing any multiplayer things ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your review!

We're working hard on new features and systems in order to make it easier to find and play with other players. So stay tuned for updates during the Summer and Fall.

We are a small team with a limited marketing budget so rely on our passionate community to help spread the word about our Buildport Xumia.

Finally a reminder that our growing discord server is a great place to find like minded players.

reviews.review_description: FUN BEST GAME EVER

developer_response.body: Wow thank you!

Writing this review while playing it. 1 major downside though is there is a horrible,  awful bug that makes me have to restart the game every five minutes its very difficult to explain but very common. Other than that its very very fun and I love playing it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! We are very happy that you are enjoying the game but sorry that you're dealing with a bug. We've would very much appreciate it if you can provide us any further details. Please find us on discord we're not allowed to post the link here but you can find it in our store page.

Thanks for your feedback regarding PvP, we are aware of this issue and are working on updates that will improve the user experience. Our game is still in early access and there's lot to come still. Feel free to join our growing community on Discord, there you will find like minded players that are really into PvP.

The graphics and immersion is amazing! As the devs made the great decision to not dumb down the graphics to the potato known as the quest 2. There are practically unlimited play styles as you can make your own ship but here are some examples, a more beefy battle ship or a nimble fighter. There are also many content updates coming, and I hope that this game becomes popular and is a great addition to your vr library.

reviews.review_description: I loaded into the game to a beautiful ￼Tutorial ￼￼￼and fun building, but could never get into a match. I’ve been trying for the past 2 months and still cannot get into any match, and I feel like I’m missing half the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi we're sorry to hear that. Please note that matchmaking requires other users to be online at the same time. But you can also invite friends to build together, hang out in the Xumi Trials or join combat in the Duel Arenas. Also Duel Arenas can played against AI enemies.

Please bear in mind that we're still in early access and updates are coming. Our next update is almost ready and is a big one! A new single player mode, new ship parts and more nice features are being added.

reviews.review_description: This Game is awesome and is so fun! You can basically build any space ships you want and test. And battle with it. This game is unique and is a must play if you want something fun.

Being able to build your own ships then take them into battle is so fun. There’s so many pieces to add to your ship. Whether it’s to make it faster, stronger, or a mix of both you can do it. I am so excited to see where this game goes in the future.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! It's amazing to finally be able to share our game with the world and stay tuned for future updates.

￼

reviews.review_description: Xumia boldly abandoned support for Meta Quest 2 and elevated the overall graphical quality of the game! There's no longer a need to play with jaggy, low-resolution graphics. In the past, imagination could only be expressed through LEGO blocks, but now with the advancement of VR technology, it's possible to express imagination in detail and play with it easily. It's incredibly enjoyable to freely play with the airplane I've created. In the next update, I hope they add support for various languages, including Korean :)

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are working on Quest 2 support and localization.

reviews.review_description: In no other game have I ever seen the ability to build your own ships with proper physics and fight your friends!

reviews.review_title: Quality game that never gets boring!
reviews.review_description: I played this game in the early access and it was extremely impressive. Now with the full release I can offer nothing but praise and tell you to buy this game! It continues to blow me away and it allows for the creatives out there to run wild and build whatever they want. Buy this game. And join the discord it’s an awesome community.

Very clever fun game, get to build your own ship be it a silly design or get really creative and build something extremely robust, you have so many pieces to play with to strengthen and speed up your ship. 

Build and name your ship, create as many ships as you like and name them and go into battle I named one Tom Cruiser 🤣 

Once it’s build you can go into battle and test out its might, with your friends and compare your builds and see who comes out victorious! 

So much more I imagine can be done with this game and I look forward to see where the devs take it! First impressions it’s seriously fun! 

Great game.

developer_response.body: Thank you! This is just the beginning we'll be sharing more information about the future of Xumia very soon!

reviews.review_description: It's an amazing game. There are some things that I don't like. However, Warning: Epilepsy Warning. I don't have Epilepsy, and it even bothered me. It's a wonderful game, but be careful if you have Epilepsy.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We are planning some tweaks and accessibility features that will hopefully mitigate those concerns.

reviews.review_description:
Jumping into Xumia was a blast I loved being able to fully customize my ship, from slapping on heavy cannons to tweaking thruster angles for tight turns. The build system is deep but intuitive, letting me experiment with wild designs. VR controls feel natural, especially when wiring up sensors to guns it’s incredibly satisfying to see your automations pay off mid-battle.

The devs are clearly passionate, and I can’t wait for more updates. If you’re into creative engineering and intense VR dogfights, Xumia is absolutely worth a try.

developer_response.body: Glad you're having fun and thank you for your support!

reviews.review_description: I love building games and flying around with stuff so this game is perfect it’s so fun and I could play for hours without getting bored

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review! Always great to welcome newcomers to this creative community.

Cons are limited part and can’t add more than one cockpit if you and your friends  want to fly a ship together and you can’t paint them .

This game is very good and for the price. It is amazing. But there's some things that I would fix or add. I think it would be cool if you could fight AI chips and even a ton of more parts that you can use to make your ships even more decked out. There's also a bunch of little tiny glitches and?
 To fix it, you have to quit the game and rejoin. I also think a great feature would be when you make a ship and you have to change something. You should just be able to update the previous build instead of having to make a whole new one and then deleting the old 1. That's about it, but this game has a ton of potential.

developer_response.body: Thank you! We're working hard on fixes and updates. But to clarify you can play duels against AI right now, just select the single player option when entering the mode.

reviews.review_description: I just got this game. I have seen so many videos on it and it looks so fun and since it recently came to quest two, I have always been wanting to play it so I finally got it I was doing the tutorial and then when I made it to the xumi trials part and told me to spawn my build in I clicked my build and it did nothing I have refunded and bought it back. I have deleted and then downloaded it again, but nothing works. I need somebody to tell me if it is just my headset if it’s just cause I’m on the quest too ￼￼ or if anybody else is having this issue ￼ I hope the devs can fix this or tell me what is wrong cause this seems like a very fun game ￼

developer_response.body:
Hi Jjetas sorry to hear about your experience. We've been busy working on a new update and didn't notice your problem because you left a 5 star, which is very nice of you!

This is the first time we are receiving reports about this issue so we don't have a lot of information at the moment.

For now we can only suggest the following:
1 - Install the game, go to Settings > General > Storage and clear Xumia's app data.
2 - Reinstall the game and try again.

Please let us know if that works for you and please know that we are currently trying to reproduce your issue to see if we can understand why it occurred.

You can also reach us directly at support@yumebau.com or join our discord https://discord.gg/r5JprwYj

Thank you for your understanding,
Xumia team
